titleExaminationSummary.titleStatusDetail: Property is subject to one confirmed active deed of trust: a Revolving Credit Deed of Trust (Doc #2026000053140, Partners Federal Credit Union, recorded 02/23/2026, $230,000 credit limit). All four prior deeds of trust have been properly reconveyed. Property is also subject to extensive CC&Rs and easements for the Foothill Ranch planned unit development.

criticalIssues.title: NAME VARIATION — "THERESA ANN ARM"
criticalIssues.description: Document Inst# 2020000187684 (Partners Federal Credit Union DOT dated 04/27/2020) lists borrower as "THERESA ANN ARM" while all other documents list "THERESA ANN VONDRAN." Must read document to confirm this is the same person or whether this represents a name discrepancy requiring correction.

criticalIssues.title: PRIOR OWNER CHAIN INCOMPLETE
criticalIssues.description: JULIAN SAMUEL LOVE AND KIMBERLEE BRANDY BURTON-LOVE (grantors on acquisition deed) were not fully searched. The prior deed conveying title to the Loves was not found in records. Unreleased encumbrances from prior ownership period may exist.

criticalIssues.title: SALE PRICE DISCREPANCY
criticalIssues.description: Documentary transfer tax of $986.70 implies a sale price of approximately $493,350, but Redfin records show a last sale price of $896,888 for the same 05/31/2016 transaction. This discrepancy requires clarification — the higher figure may include the concurrent purchase-money DOT ($717,510) or may reflect a data error.

notesAndObservations.detail: DAVID JOHN VONDRAN and THERESA ANN VONDRAN acquired title to 22 Calle Cabrillo, Foothill Ranch via Grant Deed (Doc #2016000243774) recorded 05/31/2016 from JULIAN SAMUEL LOVE AND KIMBERLEE BRANDY BURTON-LOVE. Title was taken as Husband and Wife as Joint Tenants. Documentary transfer tax of $986.70 was paid, implying a purchase price of approximately $493,350. A concurrent purchase-money Deed of Trust (Doc #2016000243775, $717,510) was recorded the same day with MERS as nominee for Broadview Mortgage Corporation.

Julian Samuel Love and Kimberlee Brandy Burton-Love held title as Husband and Wife as Joint Tenants prior to the 05/31/2016 conveyance. The instrument by which the Loves acquired title was not found in the search records. Chain not fully searched prior to their ownership.
The Vondrans have had an active borrowing pattern. Five Deeds of Trust appear on record between 2016 and 2026.
items: DOT #5 (2016000243775, 05/31/2016): Purchase-money loan, $717,510, MERS/Broadview Mortgage — RECONVEYED per Inst. 2020000219276 on 05/14/2020.
DOT #4 (2018000325101, 09/05/2018): Short-form open-end DOT, $95,700, Wells Fargo Bank — RECONVEYED per Inst. 2020000219723 on 05/14/2020.
DOT #3 (2020000187684, 04/27/2020): Fixed/adjustable rate mortgage, $778,800, Partners Federal Credit Union — RECONVEYED per Inst. 2020000219723 on 05/14/2020.
DOT #2 (2022000209674, 06/09/2022): HELOC, $200,000, Partners Federal Credit Union — RECONVEYED per Inst. 2026000059280 on 02/27/2026.
DOT #1 (2026000053140, 02/23/2026): Revolving Credit DOT, $230,000 credit limit, Partners Federal Credit Union — OPEN / ACTIVE.

notesAndObservations.detail: The most recent Deed of Trust (Doc #2026000053140, recorded 02/23/2026) is a Revolving Credit Deed of Trust in favor of Partners Federal Credit Union with a $230,000 credit limit. Trustee is T.D. Service Company, a California Corporation. The prior $200,000 HELOC with the same lender (Doc #2022000209674) was reconveyed 4 days later on 02/27/2026 (Doc #2026000059280), consistent with a refinance/replacement.

Document Inst# 2020000187684 (Partners FCU DOT, 04/27/2020, $778,800) lists the borrower as "THERESA ANN ARM" rather than "THERESA ANN VONDRAN." This is likely a data extraction or OCR error from the recording, but document review is required to confirm identity. This DOT has been reconveyed, so it does not affect current lien status, but the name variation should be noted for chain of title completeness.

Single Family Residence, 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, 2,637 sq ft living area, built 1994, on a 5,400 sq ft lot, located in the Foothill Ranch area of Orange County. APN 601-162-01. Property is within the Foothill Ranch planned unit development (Canyon Oaks Delegate District-Phase 7).

It clearly identifies the property via the legal description referencing Lot Line Adjustment LL 92-029 and Foothill Ranch (Canyon Oaks Delegate District-Phase 7).
The prior deed conveying title to Julian Samuel Love and Kimberlee Brandy Burton-Love was not found in the search records. Chain prior to 05/31/2016 was not fully searched.

examinersRecommendations.title: Title Insurance
examinersRecommendations.detail: Strongly recommend obtaining a full CLTA/ALTA title insurance commitment before proceeding with any transaction involving this property.

disclaimer: This report is for informational purposes only and does not constitute a commitment to insure title. The information contained herein has been obtained from public records maintained by the Orange County Clerk-Recorder and is believed to be accurate but is not warranted. A full title insurance commitment should be obtained for any real estate transaction. This report identifies open encumbrances that require verification and resolution before any transaction can proceed.
